title: Preorder the New Samsung Galaxy Z Phones and Get up to $350 in Amazon Gift Cards
summary: It has a 4.1-inch outer display and a 6.9-inch inner display, 12GB of RAM, and similar cameras to the Z Flip 7, including a 50MP Wide, 12MP Ultra Wide, and 10X Digital Zoom.
